header.title: Your Voting Record
header.subtitle: View your voting choices and verification code

demo_success.title: 🎉 Demo Vote Submitted Successfully!
demo_success.instructions_2: 2. Paste or type your code in the demo field
demo_success.instructions_3: 3. Click "Verify Demo Vote" to view your voting choices

real_success.title: 🎉 Congratulations {name}!
real_success.description: Thank you for participating in the election! Your vote has been successfully recorded. To view your vote, please enter the new verification code sent to your email.
real_success.security_notice: Keep your verification code private and secure

main_card.title: Verify Your Vote
main_card.subtitle: Enter your verification code to view your voting choices

real_election.instructions: A verification code has been sent to your registered email address for the Real Election. Please enter it below to view your voting record.
real_election.label: Verification Code (Real Election)
real_election.placeholder: Enter your verification code from email

demo_election.instructions: Enter your Demo Election verification code to view your test voting record. This is for testing and demonstration purposes only.
demo_election.label: Verification Code (Demo Election)

check_email.title: Check Email
check_email.description: Look for verification code in your inbox or spam folder

contact_support.title: Contact Support
contact_support.description: Send screenshot to administrator if issues persist

footer.security_message: Your vote is encrypted and secure
